address.Description: The address of the REST endpoint

client_ca_certificate_pem.Description: A PEM-encoded CA certificate chain used by the client to verify server certificates during TLS authentication

client_certificate_pem.Description: A PEM-encoded certificate used by the server to verify the client during mutual TLS (mTLS) authentication

client_private_key_pem.Description: A PEM-encoded private key, required if client_certificate_pem is specified

lock_address.Description: The address of the lock REST endpoint

lock_method.Description: The HTTP method to use when locking

password.Description: The password for HTTP basic authentication

retry_max.Description: The number of HTTP request retries

retry_wait_max.Description: The maximum time in seconds to wait between HTTP request attempts

retry_wait_min.Description: The minimum time in seconds to wait between HTTP request attempts

unlock_address.Description: The address of the unlock REST endpoint

unlock_method.Description: The HTTP method to use when unlocking

update_method.Description: HTTP method to use when updating state

username.Description: The username for HTTP basic authentication
